docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALBAN, MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
